summary.zh: 4 个智能体，终端发送（不可靠）
4 个智能体，OMAR 事件系统（可靠）
3 个行业研究组（石油/CPI/宏观），多后端

summary.en: 4 parallel research desks (oil/CPI/macro/opportunity) + risk mgr + executor. 15 position slots. Active thesis discovery.
summary.zh: 4 个并行研究组（石油/CPI/宏观/机会）+ 风控 + 执行。15 个持仓位。主动寻找交易论题。

summary.en: 3 core desks + 10 opportunity scouts in parallel. 13 researchers per full cycle. Horizontal scale for thesis discovery.
summary.zh: 3 个核心研究组 + 10 个机会侦察员并行。每轮完整周期 13 个研究员。水平扩展发现交易论题。

summary.en: Weather + econ bots auto-trade known strategies. 2 agent desks (oil/macro) for judgment calls. Quant scouts (2-3/day) develop new strategies. Codex scouts eliminated.
summary.zh: 天气+经济机器人自动执行已知策略。2个智能体研究组（石油/宏观）处理需判断的仓位。量化侦察员（每天2-3个）开发新策略。Codex侦察员已淘汰。

summary.en: Systematic strategy pipeline: Discover → Backtest → Deploy → Monitor. Scouts own pipeline stages. Hard gates before deployment (profit factor ≥1.3, annual return ≥20%). Weather bot flagged as non-compliant.
summary.zh: 系统化策略流程：发现→回测→部署→监控。侦察员负责各阶段。部署前硬性门槛（盈亏比≥1.3，年化收益≥20%）。天气机器人标记为不合规。

summary.en: Firm head becomes pure coordinator — every cycle step delegated to subagents. Mandatory risk gates (step 4) cannot be skipped. Weather bot disabled. Steps 1+2 parallel, 8+9 parallel.
summary.zh: 公司负责人变为纯协调者——每个周期步骤委托给子代理。强制风控门槛（步骤4）不可跳过。天气机器人已禁用。步骤1+2并行，8+9并行。
